---

# The Idea Compass
Developed by Vicky Zhao and Fei-Ling Tseng.  The Idea Compass is a visual tool for expanding atomic notes within a **Zettelkasten system**.  The Idea Compass doesn't need to be used with physical/digital notes, it can be used when evaluating ideas.  It is a way of looking at ideas or concepts to see where they fit in relation to other ideas and concepts and also to expand on them .

font-family="Virgil, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#1971c2" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">What's opposite</text><text x="0" y="42.62" font-family="Virgil, Segoe UI Emoji" font-size="20px" fill="#1971c2" text-anchor="start" style="white-space: pre;" direction="ltr" dominant-baseline="alphabetic">     to X</text></g></svg>

## Prompts to Help Answer the Above
### NORTH - Upstream
 - **Where does X come from?**
 - What are it's origins?
 - What belief does X support?
 - What domain exists an order of magnitude higher? Zoom out
 - What gave birth to X?
 - What causes X?
### SOUTH - Downstream
 - **Where can X lead to?**
 - What does X contribute to?
 - What group/category could X be the headline of?
 - What domain exists an order of magnitude lower? Zoom in
 - What does X nurture?
### EAST - Transformative
 - **What competes with X?**
 - What is the opposite of X?
 - What is X missing?
 - What is a disadvantage with X?
 - What could supercharge X?
### WEST - Reinforcing
 - **What is similar to X?**
 - What other disciplines could X already exist in?
 - What other disciplines could benefit from X?
 - What are alternative ways to say/do X?
